user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new attendance rule, so that attendance events like late coming or early leaving are flagged automatically
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Rule screen; When I click Add new rule and define the rule name, rule expression, time period, color and applicability; Then the rule is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view attendance rules with their expression, time period, color and applicability, so that I can review the configured attendance logic
acceptance_criteria: Given attendance rules exist; When I open the Rule screen; Then each rule is listed with its name, rule expression, time period, color and applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit or view an existing rule, so that I can keep attendance rule thresholds accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a rule is listed; When I click View or Edit and update the details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the rules list, so that I can access all rules and see the latest data
acceptance_criteria: Given there are more rules than fit on one page; When I click next or last, or click Refresh; Then the requested page loads with current data
